g.text: RFM segment strategy — what to do with each group
This is tomorrow's At Risk group
Jan 2017 cohort: period 1 retention = 0.4%. By period 5 still only 0.4%. Near-zero repeat purchase across all cohorts.
This is consistent with the 3.1% repeat rate. The cohort heatmap will be mostly empty after period 0 — that IS the story.
How to present RFM in an interview
"I segmented 95K customers into 7 groups using RFM scoring. The most alarming finding:
22,780 customers (24% of revenue) are at risk with avg 400 days since last purchase.
My recommendation: a targeted win-back campaign for At Risk customers before they move to Lost."
